creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
After applying only the delta between base r330205 and base r330206, compilation works and dmesg says:

iwm0: <Intel(R) Dual Band Wireless AC 7260> mem 0xd0700000-0xd0701fff irq 17 at device 0.0 on pci1
iwm0: hw rev 0x140, fw ver 17.352738.0, address a0:a8:cc:ee:aa:bb

So it appears that indeed firmware 17 is loaded correctly.
